Happy Birthday, Little Brother 🎂

Today the universe paused just for you. Every star aligned, every wish was made, and every heart filled with joy — because you exist.

01 — The Birthday Boy

That smile of yours?
It lights up every room.

There are people who come into this world and somehow make everything brighter without even trying. You, Vinu, are one of those rare souls. From the moment you burst into our lives, nothing has ever been the same — and thank god for that.


Your laughter is contagious, your energy is limitless, and your heart is enormous. May this birthday be the beginning of your most incredible chapter yet.

04 — From the Heart

Brothers aren't just family — they're your first best friend, your constant companion, your partner in every adventure and every misadventure. You've been all of that and more.

Watching you grow every single day fills my heart with a pride I can't even put into words. You are extraordinary, Vinu. Never let anyone dim that light of yours.

On this special day, I want you to know: I've got your back. Always. In every dream you chase, every obstacle you face — I'll be right there beside you.

— Your Brother, always 💛
